items.title: Seeking equality, Afghan cricketers head to world cup they cannot play in

children.content: In a bid for recognition, the Afghanistan women's cricket team will travel to England for the T20 World Cup — an event they cannot play in.

items.title: 'Left an enormous hole': Man sentenced after crash killed Canberra father

children.content: A Canberra man has been spared jail after being found guilty of negligent driving causing the death of motorcyclist and father Craig O'Neill in a crash two years ago.

image.altText: A crumpled motorbike on the ground near a parked truck, at night at an intersection.

items.title: New country choir boosts queer visibility

children.content: A choir formed in the tiny village of Candelo, on the New South Wales Far South Coast, is giving a voice to the LGBTQ+ community.

image.altText: a group of people singing and smiling

items.title: 'Quite emotional': Renowned artist's tapestries on display after 50 years

children.content: Tapestries depicting the life of Saint Francis of Assisi will be displayed together for the first time since being commissioned in the late 1960s by Australian artist Arthur Boyd.

gallery.altText: A large tapestry depicting a man laying on the ground as another man beats him with a stick.

items.title: Microalgae genes could be key to reversing kelp's decline

children.content: Scientists are investigating whether gene editing could become a tool for helping kelp adapt to the increasing challenges posed by climate change.

image.altText: a fish in seaweed

items.title: Start of NSW snow season missing key ingredient

children.content: The Snowy Mountains are not quite living up to their name as a slow start to the ski season leaves some seasonal workers out of a job.

image.altText: Images of patches of snow and grass atop mountain.

items.title: 'Took my breath away': Afghanistan gallery opening soon at Australian War Memorial

children.content: Australian War Memorial director Matt Anderson is asked about an invitation issued to Ben Roberts-Smith, who has been accused of war crimes, to the upcoming opening of a new gallery space dedicated to Australia's service in Afghanistan.

articles.title: Vegemite levels help Socceroos' chef find out if players like his food

articles.title: The most culturally diverse World Cup ever meets Trump's America

children.content: Fans from all over the world are being welcomed by locals across North America to celebrate the World Cup. But can it make a lasting difference in the US, where President Donald Trump has cracked down on immigration?

items.title: Gambling reform consultation slammed as 'charade' by health experts

children.content: The government is preparing to push ahead with a watered-down version of recommendations from the landmark Murphy inquiry, which called for a comprehensive ban on gambling advertising.

items.title: A major change to super payments will start next week

children.content: Many businesses support the payday superannuation changes, but some are concerned they will not be able to meet the obligations.

articles.title: Think writing off something on tax makes it free? It doesn't

children.content: Advertisers tout EOFY sales as a prime time for big buys, and hint at the promise of a generous tax refund, but that's not quite how it works.

items.title: Concerns over AI and data centres a dangerous force for Labor

children.content: While the government is trying to assure people there is nothing to fear from AI, many think technology is moving too quickly for authorities to keep up.

image.altText: A man in a vampire outfit lies on the steps of an office building with protest signs against data centres behind him.

items.title: Record 2.7 tonnes of cocaine found in Australia's biggest drug bust

children.content: A record 2.7 tonnes of cocaine worth an estimated street value of $816 million has been seized at a semi-rural property in Greater Western Sydney.

image.altText: About a dozen cops search through packages of drugs near a shipping container at night.

items.title: Australian uses AI to design cancer treatment for his dog

children.content: Rosie the dog had her tumours treated by an mRNA vaccine developed with the help of artificial intelligence. Her owner had decided to explore treatment options using AI chatbots.

children.content: The annual awards show also introduced a new category honouring Australian sports journalists, named after legendary commentator Bruce McAvaney.

items.title: The personalised, predatory design driving Australians to gamble online

children.content: Betting ads on TV have been front of mind in Canberra lately, but experts say we're overlooking the real firepower behind Australia's gambling industry: cutting-edge, hyper-personalised, online tech.

image.altText: A photo over the shoulder of a woman as she looks at a gambling app on her phone.

items.title: We sent six filmmakers to six countries to make a movie. How did they go?

children.content: From rug making in Morocco to small-town struggles in China, catch up on the films from the third week of the new season of Race Around The World.

items.title: ASX set to slip as fragile Iran war ceasefire keeps markets on edge

children.content: While Wall St was closed for a public holiday on Friday, global markets remain on edge as US-Iran peace talks falter. Follow the day's events and insights from our business reporters on the ABC News live markets blog.

items.title: Auction clearance rates fall to lowest level in six years

children.content: Not since the early days of the COVID-19 pandemic have sellers seen such disappointing results at auction, with Cotality predicting "a further loss of momentum" in the housing market.

children.content: Twenty-seven bricks of cocaine have washed up around Fiji's remote Komo Island in recent weeks. Residents are worried about what the find will bring.

items.title: Serena Williams to make Wimbledon singles comeback

children.content: Serena Williams will make a stunning return to singles at this year's Wimbledon after accepting the final wildcard berth by the All England Club.

items.title: Delays to alcohol delivery restrictions worry SA anti-violence advocates

children.content: Family violence prevention advocates say the SA government has yet to progress alcohol delivery legislation as recommended by last year's Royal Commission into Domestic, Family and Sexual Violence.

items.title: Queensland charity closes 'life-changing' NDIS employment support program

items.title: Stokes returns to England captaincy for third Test against New Zealand

children.content: Captain Ben Stokes and Gus Atkinson have returned to England's squad for the third Test against New Zealand at Trent Bridge following the conclusion of a disciplinary hearing.

items.title: Australia posts seven-wicket T20I win over Bangladesh as Johnson stars with ball

children.content: Spencer Johnson proves to be a menace with the ball for Australia, as the tourists complete a T20I series clean sweep against Bangladesh.
